landing.subtitle: The Spotify Wrapped that never closes. Complete stats, real history and stunning visualizations — available 365 days a year.
landing.feature1_desc: Total hours, play counts, times, streaks. Everything Spotify Wrapped hides all year long.
landing.feature2_desc: Connect your Last.fm and unlock years of full history. Automatic scrobbling via Spotify.
landing.feature3_desc: Sharing cards with colors extracted from your top artist's cover. One-click export.
landing.step1_desc: OAuth login. Your top tracks and artists load immediately.
landing.step2_desc: Connect to unlock full history and real play counts.
landing.step3_desc: Browse all your stats and generate shareable cards.

dashboard.demo_notice: Showing demo data. Connect Spotify to see your real statistics.
dashboard.share_desc: Colors generated from your top artist's cover
dashboard.how_card_desc: The card automatically extracts the dominant color from your #1 artist's cover and adapts the entire background gradient. You can also edit the theme manually.
dashboard.upload_hint: Upload your Spotify streaming history in the History tab to see charts and detailed stats.

connect.title: Connect Integrations
connect.subtitle: Connect your accounts to unlock all statistics.
connect.lastfm_error: Connection error. Check the username and try again.
connect.lastfm_note: Read-only — we don't need your password.
connect.spotify_missing_client_id: Add VITE_SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID to your .env file to connect.
connect.spotify_missing_redirect: Add VITE_SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI to your .env file to connect.
connect.lastfm_missing_key: Add VITE_LASTFM_API_KEY to your .env file to use Last.fm.
connect.lastfm_why_desc: Last.fm stores your full listening history and real play counts — data Spotify's API doesn't expose. Without it, charts and play counts will be estimated. You can skip this and connect later from the History tab.
connect.both_connected_subtitle: All connected. Taking you to the dashboard...

callback.wait: Please wait while we authenticate your account.
callback.error_403_desc: Since February 2026, Spotify requires Premium to use the Web API in development mode. The app owner must have Spotify Premium to enable access.
callback.error_desc: An error occurred while connecting to Spotify. Please try again.

upload.title: Upload History
upload.subtitle: Upload your Spotify Extended Streaming History for complete statistics.
upload.error_json: Select JSON files from Extended Streaming History.
upload.step1: Go to your Spotify account at spotify.com
upload.step2: Go to Privacy and click 'Request your data'
upload.step3: Wait for the email with the download link (may take days)
upload.step4: Extract the ZIP and upload Streaming_History_Audio_*.json files
upload.why: Your full history enables calculation of hours listened, active days, favorite times and more — data Spotify doesn't expose through the API.
upload.note: Files stay in your browser only. No data is sent to external servers.
upload.already_loaded: History loaded — {{plays}} plays total. Upload again to update.
